method: clean-margin reconstruction (reference plate carries baked-in HUD content, so the plate was rebuilt from content-free bands)
recipe: plate bbox in reference: x 4..848, y 38..138 (845x101)
left cap: real crop x 4..24 (bevel + corner)
right cap: real crop x 829..849 (bevel + corner)
interior: clean strip x 796..844 (rows 42..135) tiled horizontally, mirrored alternation, 12px cross-fade seams
top/bottom bevel bands (4px): clean segment x 300..790 stretched (avoids ornament studs at x 21..115 / 200..207 / 834..847)
alpha: rounded-rect mask radius 6 (reference has ~2px chamfer + AA)

nine_slice.note: corners fixed, edges/center stretch; draw via drawAssetClipped 9-patch

intended_use: world-map home top resource bar background (ResourceTopBarCanvasRenderer.renderMapHomeTopBar)
